bird.name: 棕麻雀
bird.summary: 棕麻雀（Passer motitensis）是麻雀属的一种鸟类，生活在非洲南部的干旱地区，体长15–16 cm厘米，看起来像是大号的家麻雀。它和棕背麻雀有时被视为同一种。 参考文献 外部链接 Southern Rufous Sparrow （页面存档备份，存于互联网档案馆） a…

locations.name: 麻雀科
locations.summary: 雀科（學名：Passeridae，台湾作麻雀科）为鸟纲雀形目的一个科。本科有8屬43種。 分类 淡色石雀属 Carpospiza 淡色石雀 Carpospiza brachydactyla 桂红绣眼鸟属 Hypocryptadius 桂红…

relations.subject: 棕麻雀
relations.evidence: A.|title=On the original description of Passer iagoensis motitensis Smith|journal=Bulletin of the British Ornithologists' Club|volume=84|issue=6|year=1964|page=110}} }} The great sparrow (Passer motitensis), also known as the southern rufous sparrow, is found in southern Africa in dry, wooded savannah and towns. This is a 15–16 cm long sparrow superficially like a large house sparrow
